item.ptxt: Do not turn ON ignition switch with ignition key in contact with or very close to another key. Or, the immobilizer control system may detect some abnormal condition and prevent the engine from starting.

Do not turn ON ignition switch by using ignition key with any type of metal (1) wrapped round its grip or in contact with key. Or, the immobilizer control system may detect some abnormal condition and prevent the engine from starting.
Do not leave ignition key in a place where temperature is high. High temperature may cause damage to the transponder built in the ignition key.

Do not turn ignition switch to ON position by bringing radio antenna close to immobilizer coil antenna. Or, the immobilizer control system may detect some abnormal condition and prevent the engine from starting.
